name: Courtyard Sour Cream-Raisin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Beat in the sugar, sour cream, cinnamon, salt, and cloves.
4. Stir in the raisins and flour.
5. Roll out the bottom crust and place it in a 9-inch pie plate. Trim even with the edge.
6. Pour the raisin mixture into the pastry-lined plate.
7. Roll out the top crust and arrange over the filling.
8. Seal and flute the edge.
9. Brush the top of the pie with milk; sprinkle with 1 teaspoon sugar.
10. Cut slits to allow steam to escape.
11. Cover the edge of the pie with foil.
12. Bake for 25 minutes.
13. Remove the foil and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden and the filling is bubbly.
